title: JobKeeper Payment
description: The JobKeeper Payment was a COVID support measure administered by the ATO.
keywords: coronavirus, COVID-19, jobkeeper, job keeper, subsidy, Job Keeper Payment, jobkeeper payment, COVID-19 self employed, coronavirus self employer, COVID-19 business, coronavirus business, COVID-19 employer, coronavirus employer, COVID-19 employee, coronavirus employee, JobKeeper reimbursement, JobKeeper business payment, JobKeeper payment scheme

content_blocks.text: The JobKeeper Payment scheme supported Australian businesses significantly impacted by coronavirus (COVID-19).
JobKeeper finished on 28 March 2021. In most circumstances, the scheme's last day for payment was 31 March 2022.

content_text:
The JobKeeper Payment scheme supported Australian businesses significantly impacted by coronavirus (COVID-19).
JobKeeper finished on 28 March 2021. In most circumstances, the scheme's last day for payment was 31 March 2022.
